non_blocking_issues: Issue 3: definitive test recommended before declaring the lag fixed — add DebugLog to capture first-send PromptRequest.agent/model values in draft mode.
opencode-src/ not present locally; server SSE session.error schema confirmed via web search but not verified against local source. Recommend git clone sst/opencode for future server-behavior audits.
MainViewModelMessageActions.kt: after defensive change, lastAssistant/inferredAgentName/newAgent locals become unused (benign warnings). [CLEANED UP before release.]

issues_reviewed.title: Tab horizontal-swipe flicker
issues_reviewed.root_cause: HorizontalPager no key=; rememberLazyListState unkeyed. Flicker on BOTH swipe directions whenever selectSession prepends (slot reuse).
issues_reviewed.fix: Single-line: key={ page -> rootSessions[page]?.id }. Sufficient alone; LazyListState keying optional.

issues_reviewed.title: First slash-command in draft errors
issues_reviewed.root_cause: executeCommand else-branch does currentSessionId ?: error; no materialization.
issues_reviewed.fix: Shared materializeDraftSession helper; lazy materialization preserved; /clear stays local.

issues_reviewed.title: agent/model switch one-message lag
issues_reviewed.root_cause: Current code (0efe5b6) should NOT lag for existing sessions on either path. Draft agent-not-persisted is asymmetric but doesn't cause second-message pattern.
issues_reviewed.fix: Do NOT modify as hotfix without definitive test. Defensive symmetry (draft agent persist) applied as low-risk hardening.

issues_reviewed.title: Rate-limit/quota errors invisible
issues_reviewed.root_cause: Two silent-drop paths: SSE no session.error/else; ChatMessageContent filters error-only messages. Server confirmed to emit session.error (sst/opencode EventSessionError).
issues_reviewed.fix: Add session.error SSE branch (UiEvent.Error + attach to last assistant msg) + else-log; unfilter error-bearing messages. Reuse ErrorCard, NOT CompletedTaskCard/marker.

issues_reviewed.title: Server switch loses model-disable config
issues_reviewed.root_cause: Bug is NOT key type (already by-URL); bug is URL-edit doesn't clear old key + configureServer skips HostProfileSwitched.
issues_reviewed.fix: Keep by-URL (NOT HostProfile.id); clear on URL edit/delete/configureServer; manual refresh inherit = oldDisabled ∩ newAvailable. Storage: model_availability_<url> + disabled_models_<url>.

notes: Web search confirmed opencode server emits SSE 'session.error' (type, sessionID, error.name, error.data.message/statusCode). Recommended Fix A+B for Issue 4 over metadata-marker/CompletedTaskCard reuse. Strongly oppose switching Issue 5 key to HostProfile.id.
